justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's time preferences throughout the conversation, accurately converting "next Friday" to June 5th and subsequently checking full weeks as requested.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently proposed checking the rest of the current week or the following week, which is a reasonable approach, but it did not offer alternative contact mediums until very late in the conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent engaged in a repetitive loop of checking three days, then the remaining two days of each week, leading to many unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and the lengthy, unproductive back-and-forth of checking each week in two parts made the conversation frustrating and inefficient for the customer.
